problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Perovskite. Perovskite crystal structure optimization directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
